jobs.title: 3rd Grade Portuguese DLI Teacher and Elementary Interventionist
jobs.status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:Active Utah Early Childhood Education or Elementary Education or Secondary Education License required.  Must have or be eligible to obtain a World Language Endorsement for Portuguese AND a Dual Immersion Endorsement.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.  For new hires and rehires,WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. jobs.title: Assistant Girls Volleyball Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Assistant Girls Volleyball coaching assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Randy Wyatt, at randy.wyatt@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.
